# Algunos test clásicos

Planteamiento de la pregunta de manera clara y concreta

Diseño de la recogida de los datos

Análisis de los resultados (distribución binomial) Análisis de los resultados (distribución binomial) Análisis de los resultados (distribución binomial) Análisis de los resultados (distribución binomial)

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
```{=html}
<div class="tabla-wrapper_T0802">
<table class="tabla-0805">

<colgroup>
<col style="width: 8%;">
<col style="width: 11%;">
<col style="width: 11%;">
</colgroup>

<tbody>
<tr>
  <td colspan="3">10 lanzamientos</td>
</tr>

<tr>
  <td>Num. <br> caras</td>
  <td>Prob. <br> individual</td>
  <td>Prob. <br> acumulada</td>
</tr>

<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>



</tbody>
</table>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
```{=html}
<div class="tabla-wrapper_T0802">
<table class="tabla-0805">

<colgroup>
<col style="width: 8%;">
<col style="width: 11%;">
<col style="width: 11%;">
</colgroup>

<tbody>
<tr>
  <td colspan="3">10 lanzamientos</td>
</tr>

<tr>
  <td>Num. <br> caras</td>
  <td>Prob. <br> individual</td>
  <td>Prob. <br> acumulada</td>
</tr>

<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>
<tr> <td>0</td> <td>3362</td> <td>29</td> </tr>

</tbody>
</table>
</div>
```
:::
:::
